productDisplayName: Timberland Men Jeunes Brown Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in absolute comfort in the timberland Asphalt Trail FTK high ankle shoes and take them on adventurous treks. Designed with leather and absolute cushioning, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long.UpperLeather upper with stitch detailing for durability and breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitHigh-ankle for enhanced support to the lower leg and styleHaul loop for hanging the boots from a backpackComplete padded fabric inner lining for all-day comfortCushioned foam footbed with a leather lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protection and all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with rectangular lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and heel, and brand logo-shaped lugs on the mid-length for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleFloater careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
